pi_items.source: examples/redmine_env/scripts/seed_redmine.rb creates an issue with subject 'Payment gateway timeout during peak traffic (>500 concurrent users)'
examples/redmine_env/scripts/seed_redmine.rb creates an issue with subject 'Login button unresponsive on mobile Safari iOS 17'
examples/redmine_env/scripts/seed_redmine.rb creates a user with firstname 'Carol', lastname 'Santos', login 'carol.santos'

privileged_info_summary: The Redmine environment is populated with synthetic data. The target project identifier is verified as 'phoenix-ecommerce', containing a milestone named 'v1.0 Launch'. The task involves two issues within this milestone containing the fragments 'Payment gateway timeout' and 'Login button unresponsive'. The intended reassignment target is the user 'Carol Santos'. The evaluation scripts export the final state to '/tmp/release_blocking_triage_result.json'.
